name: TensorPM v1.12.1-beta.1 (Beta)
body:
# Changelog - v1.12.1-beta.1

## 🏗️ Improvements

### A warmer, calmer first-run onboarding

The first-time setup now reads more like a relaxed conversation with a project expert:

- ✅ **TensorPM introduces itself as your project expert** — The opening makes it clear who you're talking to and what it will do for you, before asking anything.
- ✅ **A gentler way of asking about your project** — Instead of a list of demands, TensorPM simply asks "So, what are you working on?" and reassures you that a few rough sentences are enough — it shapes the rest into a clear project.
- ✅ **Text streams at a natural reading pace** — Onboarding messages now appear at a calm, even speed tuned to comfortable reading, with a short breath after each sentence, so nothing feels rushed.
- ✅ **The input box matches the message** — The project field no longer asks more than the conversation does; rough notes are explicitly welcome.

### Switch language right from the welcome screen

- ✅ **New EN/DE language switcher** — A small switcher in the top-left corner of the onboarding welcome screen lets you choose English or German before you begin. Your choice is remembered across the app.

## 📝 Notes

This is a prerelease (beta) focused on onboarding polish. There are no data, sync, or account changes.

---

## 📅 Release Info

- **Version**: 1.12.1-beta.1
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-19
- **Previous Version**: 1.12.0-beta.3
- **Type**: Prerelease (Beta) — Onboarding improvements
